name: View dashboard
description: An administrative user views the main dashboard with summary information.

name: Configure system settings
description: Super administrator updates global school system settings.

name: Create Student
description: Register a new student in the database by providing personal details.

name: Create School
description: A Master registers a new school in the system by providing a name and medium of instruction.

name: Assign Course
description: A Master assigns a new course to a section, selecting course name, teacher, and department.

name: Create Exam
description: An Admin schedules a new exam by defining term, exam name, and start/end dates.

name: Register account
description: A new user creates an account to access the school management system.

name: Log in
description: A registered user authenticates into the system.

name: Reset password
description: A user recovers access by resetting a forgotten password.

name: Manage platform content
description: Admin uses the Django admin interface to manage users, courses, quizzes, and payments.
evidence_paths: accounts/admin.py | course/admin.py | quiz/admin.py | payments/admin.py | result/admin.py | search/admin.py

name: Create assignment
description: A teacher creates an assignment, attaches instructions or files, and assigns it to one or more classes.

name: Publish announcement
description: An administrator creates and publishes school-wide announcements or news posts visible to all users.

name: Add Course
description: Create a new course offering, such as a class or subject, in the system.

name: Add Student
description: User adds a new student record by filling a form.

name: Update Student
description: User edits an existing student's information.

name: Search courses
description: User searches for courses by keyword and filters results.

name: Create Assignment
description: Define a new assignment for a course, including instructions and deadline.

name: Manage Students
description: Staff can view and manage student details relevant to their role.

name: Manage student records
description: Support team creates, updates, and maintains student enrollment and profile data.

name: Record exam marks
description: Support team enters and edits student marks for exams.

name: View child academic info
description: A parent monitors a child's school information and performance.

name: Browse and enroll in course
description: Student searches or browses available courses and enrolls, possibly through a payment step.

name: Publish Notices
description: An administrator publishes school-wide notices visible to students and teachers.

name: View Course Catalog
description: Browse available courses and view basic details.

name: Login
description: Authenticated users log into the system using their credentials to access role-based dashboards.

name: Make Payment
description: A student can pay school fees using Stripe from their account.

name: View Payment History
description: A student can view the history of their payment receipts.
